content.text:
<think>
Looking at the chart, I can see a radar/polar chart in the top right showing "Avg Flight Distance" by day of the week. The days visible are Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat/Sun.

The question asks about the highest **range** of flying distance. Looking at the arcs, they seem color-coded by day. The range would mean the difference between the longest and shortest throws on a given day.

Looking at the radar chart, Tuesday (Tue) appears to have the largest colored segment. But the question is about "range" (max - min).

Looking at the arcs more carefully, the colors seem to span from short to long distances. The legend/radar chart shows different days with different colored sections. Tuesday appears to have a large orange/red section suggesting high variance.

From the radar chart, Tuesday seems to have the largest spread/range.
</think>

<answer>
Tuesday
</answer>
